profile.text: Professional focused on the development of functional, responsive web interfaces aligned with user requirements. Experience in implementing front-end solutions applying development best practices, code maintenance, and component optimization. Focus on building clear, efficient, and easy-to-use digital products.

bullets.b1: Developed an inspection and certification management system for fuel stations (EDS), optimizing workflows and process traceability.
bullets.b2: Implemented certificate validation through QR codes, speeding up verification and increasing trust in provided services.
bullets.b3: Integrated Google Sheets as an intermediate database, enabling analysis and report tracking for more effective decision-making.
bullets.b4: Designed a PDF template system for certificates, ensuring institutional consistency and improving presentation to clients and regulators.

bullets.b1: Built responsive interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS, improving interaction and satisfaction for end users.
bullets.b2: Developed REST API integrations and optimized application performance, contributing to operational continuity and project scalability for clients.

bullets.b1: Develop and maintain websites and small web apps for diverse clients.
bullets.b2: Deploy projects to production using cPanel and Vercel, ensuring availability and stability.
bullets.b3: Configure custom domains to improve clients' digital presence.
bullets.b4: Apply basic SEO and performance optimization to improve visibility and efficiency.
bullets.b5: Prepare technical documentation and provide client support in web environments, making delivered solutions easier to manage and use.

certificates.name: EDS Certificate System
certificates.description: Web platform for issuing, managing, and validating inspection certificates, optimizing internal processes and strengthening the company's reputation with clients and regulators. Includes an admin panel and a public verification portal for transparent access.

iso.name: ISO 17020 Management Portal
iso.description: Documentation and quality control system for inspection bodies, designed to improve operational efficiency and regulatory compliance while supporting excellence and differentiation in the sector.

items.i5: Manejo de Datos, Estructuras y Funciones

services.title: Web Services - Development, SEO & Optimization | DaniDevCol
services.description: Responsive web design, Next.js development, SEO optimization, and digital consulting. Professional solutions for global businesses from Colombia. Boost your online presence.

portfolio.title: Web Portfolio - Next.js & React Projects | DaniDevCol
portfolio.description: Success cases in web development: Somos Criteria, Oasix, CertiXion. Portfolio with 6+ projects. Measurable results in UX, performance, and conversions.

curriculum.title: Daniel Pérez Guzman - Full Stack Developer | danidevcol
curriculum.description: CV of Daniel Pérez: Full Stack Developer with 3+ years in Next.js, React, TypeScript. Expert in web optimization, project management, and automation. Colombia-based.

somosCriteria.name: Somos Criteria
somosCriteria.description: Political consulting focused on strategy and digital presence.
somosCriteria.fullDescription: Corporate website for Somos Criteria, a political consulting firm. The project focused on presenting services, professional authority, and value proposition with a clear structure and modern experience.

womenOasix.name: Women Oasix
womenOasix.description: Freelancer profile website for a personal client brand.
womenOasix.fullDescription: Freelancer profile website developed for a client, focused on strengthening her personal brand, showcasing services, and enabling business contact with a clean and professional visual experience.

raicesDeOro.name: Raices de Oro
raicesDeOro.description: University entrepreneurship project with product and identity focus.
raicesDeOro.fullDescription: Landing page for a university entrepreneurship initiative focused on communicating project story, product value, and brand identity. The site was built with a clear visual narrative and simple navigation.

certixion.name: CertiXion
certixion.description: Application for ISO 17020 management with cloud integrations.
certixion.fullDescription: Application built with Next.js and Firebase to manage ISO 17020 related processes. It includes Google Drive integration for document centralization, traceability, and operational efficiency.

constructora0312.name: Constructora 0312
constructora0312.description: Corporate website for construction sector services.
constructora0312.fullDescription: Website project for Constructora 0312 focused on presenting company experience, service lines, and contact channels. The content architecture was designed for commercial clarity and lead capture.
constructora0312.technologies: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design

servicrep.name: Servicrep
servicrep.description: Inspection organization with institutional digital presence.
servicrep.fullDescription: Website for Servicrep, an inspection organization, focused on presenting service scope, technical trust, and support channels. The experience prioritizes clear information and conversion.
